title: K-200 Battery Maintenance Procedure
text:
# K-200 Battery Maintenance Procedure

Document number: MD-DOC-470-H. Revision: H. Type: manual. Author: Felix Herrera. Created: 2025-05-22. Last modified: 2026-01-09. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Battery subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1008, P-1098, P-1175, P-1110.
